name: Endless Inside
short_description: Get ready to mix scares, puzzles, hidden secrets, exploration and survive modes around dusty and dark sites with three alternate endings into one disturbing night full of strange activity, creepy giggles under the floors and spooky songs coming from old objects arround a closed Arts University.
detailed_description:
Endless Inside mix free exploration mode and different countdown survive modes where the player will have to solve and discover the secrets of an old art university. Get ready to solve puzzles and hide to survive. On this place you will meet all beings who are waiting to get revenge and know about them to understand the story.

Features:


  • 6 playable phases
  • 3 alternate endings
  • Extra survive mode
  • Optional hidden secrets


Updates of this game will be free after your first purchase.
